name: Harbour Grand Victoria
description: Oceanfront hotel with full spa access and stunning harbour views. Steps from the inner harbour and downtown Victoria.

name: Skyline Toronto Hotel
description: A downtown hotel close to the CN Tower, shopping, and entertainment. Enjoy rooftop views of the Toronto skyline.

name: Pacific Rim Vancouver
description: Modern hotel offering breathtaking mountain and ocean views. Located in the heart of downtown Vancouver.

name: Manhattan Grand New York
description: Luxury hotel in the heart of Midtown Manhattan, minutes from Times Square with iconic skyline views.

name: Sunset Boulevard Hotel
description: Stylish hotel near Hollywood with a rooftop pool, outdoor lounge, and sweeping city views at golden hour.

name: The Westminster London
description: Classic British elegance steps from Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, and the River Thames.

name: Eiffel Prestige Paris
description: Romantic Parisian hotel steps from the Eiffel Tower. Enjoy fine dining, world-class service, and Seine River views.

name: Sakura Grand Tokyo
description: Sleek and modern hotel in Shinjuku with traditional Japanese design touches and city panorama views.

name: Harbour Bridge Sydney
description: Contemporary hotel with direct views of the iconic Sydney Harbour Bridge and Opera House.

name: Desert Pearl Dubai
description: Ultra-luxury 5-star resort with an infinity pool, world-class spa, and views of the Burj Khalifa.

name: Colosseum Suites Rome
description: Boutique hotel near the Colosseum blending ancient Roman charm with modern luxury amenities.

name: Casa Catalunya Barcelona
description: Vibrant hotel in the Gothic Quarter featuring a rooftop terrace, tapas bar, and views of Sagrada Familia.
